'''Operation Venom''' was a military operation spearheaded by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Bethrogg]] of the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Behemoth (Imperial-class)|''Behemoth'']].

==History==
The operation's purpose was to find and eliminate the [[Pegasus Strike Force]], which was active in the Mid Rim.<ref name="TP" />

While the operation didn't succeed, it did force the Pegasus Strike Force to disband its forces to keep it from being a bigger target.<ref name="TP" />

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|2|The Prophecy}}
